---
pagetitle: "CV · Simon Hamra"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Simon Hamra: applied business analytics, PySpark and machine learning. Downloadable PDF."
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.page-intro}
::: {.wrap}
<span class="eyebrow">CV</span>

# Curriculum vitae.

::: {.lead}
A short summary of my background, skills and experience. You can read it here or download the full PDF.
:::

::: {.btn-row}
[Download PDF](assets/cv/Simon-Hamra-CV.pdf){.btn .btn--brand}
[Email me](mailto:simhamra@gmail.com){.btn .btn--ghost}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}

::: {.section__head}
<span class="eyebrow">Profile</span>

## Business and marketing first, data and ML now
:::

<p class="lead" style="max-width:75ch">I am a business analytics master student with a background in business and marketing. I work with large labor market data in PySpark, I have a solid base in statistics, and I am moving into machine learning. I learn fast when the problem is real, and I try to explain results in plain words.</p>

:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.section__head}
<span class="eyebrow">Skills</span>

## What I work with
:::

::: {.skills}
::: {.skill}
### Programming
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">Python (intermediate)</span><span class="tag">pandas</span><span class="tag">scikit-learn</span><span class="tag">TensorFlow / Keras</span><span class="tag">R</span><span class="tag">SQL</span></div>
:::
::: {.skill}
### Machine learning
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">Regression</span><span class="tag">Tree models</span><span class="tag">Neural networks</span><span class="tag">Transformers (learning)</span></div>
:::
::: {.skill}
### Big data
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">PySpark</span><span class="tag">Spark SQL</span></div>
:::
::: {.skill}
### Cloud and tools
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">AWS EC2</span><span class="tag">Power BI</span><span class="tag">Quarto</span><span class="tag">Git</span></div>
:::
::: {.skill}
### Foundations
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">Statistics</span><span class="tag">Probability</span></div>
:::
::: {.skill}
### Languages
<div class="tags"><span class="tag">French (native)</span><span class="tag">English (professional)</span></div>
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.bento}

::: {.card .col-3}
<span class="eyebrow">Education</span>

::: {.tl}
::: {.tl__item .is-now}
<span class="tl__when">Current · Boston</span>
<div class="tl__what">MS, Applied Business Analytics</div>
<span class="tl__where">Boston University, Metropolitan College</span>
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Master</span>
<div class="tl__what">MSc, Marketing</div>
<span class="tl__where">HULT International Business School</span>
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">Bachelor</span>
<div class="tl__what">BSc, Management</div>
<span class="tl__where">Rennes School of Business</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.card .col-3}
<span class="eyebrow">Experience</span>

::: {.tl}
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">London</span>
<div class="tl__what">Social media and content</div>
<span class="tl__where">OneEvent</span>

Managed the public image of DJs on social media. Created reels and posts, and helped grow their reach.
:::
::: {.tl__item}
<span class="tl__when">France</span>
<div class="tl__what">E-commerce and marketing intern</div>
<span class="tl__where">Fereira</span>

SEO and online marketing for an e-commerce shop.
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.contact-card}
<span class="eyebrow">Take it with you</span>

### Download the full CV

::: {.btn-row style="justify-content:center"}
[Download PDF](assets/cv/Simon-Hamra-CV.pdf){.btn .btn--brand}
:::
:::
:::
:::
